description_long: This object is a vintage-style self-service payment kiosk, resembling an old-fashioned soda vending machine with a robust, rectangular metal body painted in a muted green color. The front features a prominent coin slot, a lever, and a rectangular access panel, along with a circular Dr Pepper logo and faded signage indicating pricing. The sides are mostly plain, with one side displaying a small bottle graphic and the other side unadorned. The surface shows signs of wear, rust, and age, suggesting long-term outdoor or public use. The base is slightly recessed and darker, likely to protect against ground contact and moisture. The overall design is utilitarian, with clear areas for user interaction and branding.
description: A vintage green self-service payment kiosk with a Dr Pepper logo, coin slot, and lever, showing signs of age and wear. The front is interactive, while the sides are mostly plain with minimal graphics.
description_view_0: Front view shows the Dr Pepper logo, coin slot, lever, access panel, and faded signage.
description_view_1: Left side view is plain green with no significant features or graphics.
description_view_2: Rear view is entirely plain, showing only the green metal surface with some rust and wear.
description_view_3: Right side view features a small bottle graphic and some rust, otherwise plain.
attribute_payment_interface: A coin slot and lever are present on the front, with a rectangular access panel below; no digital or card payment interface is visible.
attribute_branding_or_logo: A circular Dr Pepper logo is printed on the upper front, and a small bottle graphic is printed on the right side.
attribute_instructional_signage: Faded pricing and product signage are present on the front above the coin slot, printed in a circular area.
